Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and red and green striped strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this brown leather Gucci Jackie small shoulder bag.
Model: 782849
Color: Brown Full Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
